@graph.name: RentFlow Pro
@graph.description: The complete rental property management solution for landlords and tenants in Kenya. Collect rent via M-Pesa, manage tenants, track payments, and grow your real estate business.

@graph.name: Rental Property Management
@graph.description: Complete rental management platform for landlords and property managers in Kenya

acceptedAnswer.text: RentFlow Pro is a rental property management platform in Kenya that helps landlords collect rent via M-Pesa, manage tenants, track payments, and generate digital receipts.

mainEntity.name: How does M-Pesa rent collection work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tenants receive automated rent reminders and can pay via M-Pesa STK Push. The payment is instantly verified and digital receipts are auto-generated.
Yes, landlords can add and manage multiple properties, each with multiple units, from a single dashboard.
Yes, RentFlow Pro offers a free tier for small property managers.

mainEntity.name: How do I sign up as a tenant?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tenants can sign up directly or receive invitations from their landlord.
